mapper.insert: INSERT INTO waitlist (user_id, train_id, seat_count, create_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{trainId}, #{seatCount}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT w.*, t.train_no, t.departure, t.destination, t.departure_time FROM waitlist w LEFT JOIN train t ON w.train_id = t.id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM waitlist WHERE train_id = #{trainId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT w.*, t.train_no, t.departure, t.destination, t.departure_time FROM waitlist w LEFT JOIN train t ON w.train_id = t.id WHERE w.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM waitlist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND train_id = #{trainId} AND status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE waitlist SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE waitlist SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
